---
title: "mean_euclidean"
generated: true
description: "Euclidean mean: the plain element-wise average."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.spd`](../nitrix-linalg-spd.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:mean_euclidean -->
```python
mean_euclidean(input: Float[Array, '... batch d d'], *, axis: Union[int, Sequence[int]] = 0) -> Float[Array, '... d d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:mean_euclidean -->
Euclidean mean: the plain element-wise average.

Provided for symmetry with the SPD-specific means.  The Euclidean mean of
SPD matrices is itself SPD (the cone is convex), so this is geometrically
valid; it is simply *not* the geodesic mean.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:mean_euclidean -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `input` | `Float` | `...` × `batch` × `d` × `d` | — | Batch of symmetric matrices, with each `d` by `d` matrix on the two trailing axes and one or more batch axes to average over. |
| `axis` | `Union[int, Sequence[int]]` | — | `0` | Axis or axes over which to average (default `0`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `d` × `d`. The element-wise mean matrix, with the averaged axes removed.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:mean_euclidean -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `batch` | leading batch axes (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
